reasoning: Based on evidence that the 2025 World Championships in Singapore (July) did not see the women's 200m freestyle world record broken - with O'Callaghan winning gold but not breaking the record and Li Bingjie getting silver at 1:54.52 (well above the 1:52.23 record).
